description: The UVAtlasAnimator component is used primarily to drive texture animations on materials like GIFs. It can also be used as a sprite sheet to animate things like 2D mouths.

fields.ScaleField: The texture's ``TextureScale`` field that should be driven
fields.OffsetField: The texture's ``TextureOffset`` field that should be driven
fields.AtlasInfo: The AtlasInfo component that provides the size and frame amount for the atlas
fields.Frame: Which frame of the atlas the texture scale and offset should be driven to

usage: Attach to a slot and provide the component with the Scale and Offset fields of any Material. Then, set the material's image to a sprite sheet of a set of animation frames. Then provide a AtlasInfo with the proper data. Finally, use a TimeIntDriver to drive ``Frame`` to animate always, or set/drive ``Frame`` to the frame on the sheet you want in some other way like ProtoFlux.
